com.scm.all.pfunc

类 CGRDisplayViewerEventHandler

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.scm.all.pfunc.CGRDisplayViewerEventHandler

  • public class CGRDisplayViewerEventHandler
extends java.lang.Object
    报表回调类 查询显示器启动以后可以绑定成功！
